perturbation.original_text: As used in this letter agreement (this “Agreement”), the term “Evaluation Material” means all information regarding the Company, its affiliates and its and their respective businesses, technology, products, prospects and plans, a Transaction (including the fact that the Company or its affiliates may pursue a Transaction with you and the existence and terms of this Agreement) and other information furnished to you or your Representatives (as defined below) by the Company or any of its Representatives in connection with the Transaction, irrespective of form or medium of communication, whether prepared by the Company, its Representatives or otherwise and whether furnished on or after the date of this Agreement, together with all tangible and intangible embodiments and copies thereof and together with any and all analyses, compilations, summaries, forecasts, studies or other materials prepared by you or your Representatives that contain, are based on or otherwise incorporate, in whole or part, such information.
perturbation.changed_text: As used in this letter agreement (this “Agreement”), the term “Evaluation Material” means only the final, audited financial statements of the Company, its affiliates and its and their respective businesses directly related to the period no more than 1 year before the execution date, furnished to you or your Representatives (as defined below) by the Company or any of its Representatives in connection with the Transaction, irrespective of form or medium of communication, whether prepared by the Company, its Representatives or otherwise and whether furnished on or after the date of this Agreement, together with all tangible embodiments and copies thereof and together with any and all summaries prepared by you or your Representatives that directly quote, are based on or otherwise incorporate, in whole or part, such information.
perturbation.explanation: The definition of "Evaluation Material" is significantly narrowed to include only final, audited financial statements and summaries directly quoting them. This contradicts later sections that assume a broader scope of "Evaluation Material," such as sections dealing with technology, products, prospects, and plans, thus creating an in-text contradiction. For instance, Section 1 refers to the Evaluation Material covering also the Company's prospects which are now not under the restricted modified definition.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You and your Representatives will (i) use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of evaluating a possible Transaction with the Company involving you and (ii) keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential and (except as required by applicable law, regulation or legal process, and only after compliance with paragraph 6 below under the heading “Compelled Disclosure”) will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, disclose any Evaluation Material to any person, except that the Evaluation Material (or portions thereof) may be disclosed to those of your Representatives who need to know such information solely for the purpose of evaluating a possible Transaction (it being understood that prior to such disclosure your Representatives will be informed of the confidential nature of the Evaluation Material and directed that such information is to be kept confidential and not used for any purpose other than the evaluation of the possible Transaction). You will make reasonable and appropriate efforts to safeguard Evaluation Material from disclosure by you or your Representatives to anyone other than as permitted hereby by using, in all material respects, the same degree of care that you use to protect your own confidential, proprietary information. You agree to be responsible for any failure by your Representatives to comply with this Agreement (including, without limitation, any actions or inactions by your Representatives that would constitute a breach if such Representatives were original signatories hereto (other than with respect to paragraph 7 below under the heading “Non-Solicitation and Non-Hire of Employees”)).
perturbation.justification: The original text defines 'Evaluation Material' broadly, encompassing various information about the Company's business, technology, products, and prospects. The changed text narrows this definition to only include final, audited financial statements. The contradicted text states that the Evaluation Material will be used for evaluating a possible transaction, implying a broader scope of information than just financial statements. Since the changed text now limits what constitutes 'Evaluation Material,' it contradicts the contradicted text, which assumes a wider range of information is included in the 'Evaluation Material' for evaluation purposes.

perturbation.original_text: The term “Representatives” means, as to any person, such person’s affiliates (only to the extent that they receive Evaluation Material) and its and their respective directors, officers, employees, managing members, general partners, advisors, agents or representatives (including legal advisors) and, subject to paragraph 5 below, financing sources, but only to the extent that such advisors, agents, representatives or financing sources receive Evaluation Material.
perturbation.changed_text: The term “Representatives” means, as to any person, only such person’s direct employees who are legal advisors and who are permanent residents of the same country where the person is registered.
perturbation.explanation: The definition of “Representatives” is restricted to only direct employees who are legal advisors and permanent residents of the same country where the person is registered, excluding all other affiliates, directors, officers, employees, managing members, general partners, advisors, agents or representatives, and financing sources. This contradicts the obligations placed on 'Representatives' in other sections, which are written assuming the original, broader definition, thus creating an in-text contradiction. For instance, section 1 still mentions the responsibility of the representatives for the evaluation material.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You and your Representatives will (i) use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of evaluating a possible Transaction with the Company involving you and (ii) keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential and (except as required by applicable law, regulation or legal process, and only after compliance with paragraph 6 below under the heading “Compelled Disclosure”) will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, disclose any Evaluation Material to any person, except that the Evaluation Material (or portions thereof) may be disclosed to those of your Representatives who need to know such information solely for the purpose of evaluating a possible Transaction (it being understood that prior to such disclosure your Representatives will be informed of the confidential nature of the Evaluation Material and directed that such information is to be kept confidential and not used for any purpose other than the evaluation of the possible Transaction). You will make reasonable and appropriate efforts to safeguard Evaluation Material from disclosure by you or your Representatives to anyone other than as permitted hereby by using, in all material respects, the same degree of care that you use to protect your own confidential, proprietary information. You agree to be responsible for any failure by your Representatives to comply with this Agreement (including, without limitation, any actions or inactions by your Representatives that would constitute a breach if such Representatives were original signatories hereto (other than with respect to paragraph 7 below under the heading “Non-Solicitation and Non-Hire of Employees”)).
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly narrows the definition of 'Representatives' to only direct employees who are legal advisors and permanent residents of the same country, whereas the original text included affiliates, directors, officers, employees, managing members, general partners, advisors, agents or representatives, and financing sources. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which places obligations on 'Representatives' related to the handling of 'Evaluation Material', assuming a much broader definition. The changed definition limits the scope of who is responsible for safeguarding the confidential information, creating a strong in-text contradiction because individuals previously covered under the original definition are now excluded, potentially undermining the agreement's enforceability regarding the confidentiality of the Evaluation Material.

perturbation.original_text: Non-Solicitation and Non-Hire of Employees 7. Until the date that is eighteen (18) months from the date of this Agreement, you will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, directly or indirectly solicit for purposes of employment, offer to hire or engage as a consultant, entice away or offer to enter into any contract with, or hire or engage as a consultant or enter into any contract with, during the period of employment or the 90-day period following such employment, any senior or key employee of the Company or its controlled affiliates who becomes known to you in connection with your evaluation of the Transaction; provided , however , that this paragraph will not prohibit you or any of your Representatives from engaging in any general advertising or general solicitation not targeted to any employees or former employees of the Company or its controlled affiliates, or from hiring any employees or former employees of the Company who respond to such solicitation. Finally, this paragraph 7 will not apply to any solicitation in the ordinary course of business initiated by one of your employees who has no knowledge of this Agreement or a potential Transaction, so long as such individual is acting without information or encouragement from any of your Representatives who does possess such knowledge.
perturbation.changed_text: Non-Solicitation and Non-Hire of Employees 7. Until the date that is eighteen (18) months from the date of this Agreement, you will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, directly or indirectly solicit for purposes of employment, offer to hire any employee of the Company or its controlled affiliates who becomes known to you for any reason whatsoever.
perturbation.explanation: The definition of "Non-Solicitation and Non-Hire of Employees" is modified to exclude the qualifiers, such as only key employees and the possibility of general advertising. The modified definition is too broad and it excludes exceptions that allow the hiring of any former or present employee even if it was part of general advertising. This creates an in-text contradiction and impacts the original intent.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Until the date that is eighteen (18) months from the date of this Agreement, you will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, directly or indirectly solicit for purposes of employment, offer to hire any employee of the Company or its controlled affiliates who becomes known to you for any reason whatsoever.
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly broadens the scope of the non-solicitation clause by removing qualifiers such as 'senior or key employee' and exceptions for 'general advertising or general solicitation'. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text, further emphasizing the contradiction. The original text contained exemptions that allowed for solicitations under specific circumstances, while the changed text removes these exceptions, thus creating a direct conflict and impacting the original intent of the non-solicitation clause. The change now prohibits any solicitation, even those previously permitted, causing a strong in-text contradiction because the new definition is all encompassing, violating the rule set in the previous definition.

perturbation.original_text: Return or Destruction of Documents 10. If you determine that you do not wish to proceed with a Transaction or your evaluation hereof, you will promptly advise the Company of that decision. In that case, or if at any time the Company so requests in writing, you will promptly (and in any event within 10 days) either, at your option, (i) deliver to the Company all of the Evaluation Material (including all copies, reproductions, summaries, analyses or extracts thereof or based thereon) in your possession or in the possession of any of your Representatives or (ii) destroy or cause to be destroyed all such Evaluation Material in your possession or in the possession of any of your Representatives (such destruction to be acknowledged by you in writing to the Company).
perturbation.changed_text: Return or Destruction of Documents 10. If you determine that you do not wish to proceed with a Transaction or your evaluation hereof, you will promptly advise the Company of that decision. In that case, or if at any time the Company so requests in writing, you will promptly (and in any event within 10 days) (i) deliver to the Company all of the Evaluation Material (including all copies, reproductions, summaries, analyses or extracts thereof or based thereon) in your possession.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the option to destroy the documents and solely enforcing return of the documents in 10(i), without acknowledging what to do with the evaluation material in the possession of any of your Representatives, it is creating ambiguity and a contradiction. Since based on the definition of the representatives, those can be financing entities that are difficult to control, as now the representatives don't have the obligation to send the documents, only the company has.
perturbation.contradicted_text: If you determine that you do not wish to proceed with a Transaction or your evaluation hereof, you will promptly advise the Company of that decision. In that case, or if at any time the Company so requests in writing, you will promptly (and in any event within 10 days) (i) deliver to the Company all of the Evaluation Material (including all copies, reproductions, summaries, analyses or extracts thereof or based thereon) in your possession.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the option to destroy evaluation material, requiring only its return. The original text allowed for either return or destruction. By eliminating the destruction option, the changed text contradicts the continued expectation in other parts of the document that destruction is a valid alternative. This creates an inconsistency in how the evaluation material should be handled, leading to a strong in-text contradiction as it alters a previously defined obligation.
